scenarios.name: empty_query
scenarios.description: An empty DiscoveryQuery (no predicates specified) must match all instances in the repository.

scenarios.name: tier_filter_note
scenarios.description: A tier:0 filter returns only Note instances (Tier 0). Tier 1 and Tier 2 instances must not appear.

scenarios.name: tier_filter_typed_record
scenarios.description: A tier:1 filter returns only TypedRecord instances (Tier 1). Tier 0 and Tier 2 instances must not appear.

scenarios.name: tier_filter_record
scenarios.description: A tier:2 filter returns only Record instances (Tier 2). Tier 0 and Tier 1 instances must not appear.

scenarios.name: type_name_article
scenarios.description: A typeName:'article' filter returns exactly all Records whose typeNamespace-qualified type name is 'article'. Tier 0/1 instances and Records of other types must not appear.

scenarios.name: type_namespace
scenarios.description: A typeNamespace:'com.example.discovery' filter returns all Tier 2 Records in that namespace. Tier 0/1 instances have no typeNamespace and must not appear.

scenarios.name: type_id_project
scenarios.description: A typeId filter matching the 'project' type UUID returns exactly the two project Records.

scenarios.name: container_alpha
scenarios.description: A containerId filter for container-alpha returns only the three articles registered as members via memberInstanceIds. Instances not in that container must not appear.

scenarios.name: container_beta
scenarios.description: A containerId filter for container-beta returns only the two project Records registered as members via memberInstanceIds.

scenarios.name: single_tag_searchable
scenarios.description: A tag filter for ['searchable'] returns all instances carrying that tag string. Instances without the tag must not appear.

scenarios.name: multi_tag_and
scenarios.description: A tag filter for ['searchable', 'indexed'] uses AND semantics: only instances carrying BOTH tags must be returned. Instances carrying only one of the two tags must not appear.

scenarios.name: lifecycle_published
scenarios.description: A lifecycleState:'published' filter returns only Records in that lifecycle state. Records in other states and Tier 0/1 instances (which have no lifecycleState) must not appear.

scenarios.name: lifecycle_draft
scenarios.description: A lifecycleState:'draft' filter returns only Records in the draft state.

scenarios.name: type_and_lifecycle_combined
scenarios.description: Combined typeName and lifecycleState predicates are evaluated as an AND conjunction. Only Records satisfying both must be returned.

scenarios.name: content_match_discovery
scenarios.description: A contentMatch:'discovery' predicate must include every instance whose Text Projection contains a segment whose normalized text contains 'discovery' as a substring. The guaranteed-recall floor is articles 1, 2, and 4 (title/body contain 'discovery'), project-2 (description contains 'discovery'), typed-record-1 (title contains 'Discovery'), and typed-record-2 (title contains 'ext:discovery'). Implementations may return additional instances.

scenarios.name: content_match_indexing
scenarios.description: A contentMatch:'indexing' predicate must include every instance with a Text Projection segment containing 'indexing'. Articles 1 and 3 each have 'indexing' as a multiselect topics value. This tests that multiselect elements each contribute a separate segment.

scenarios.name: content_match_indexed_tag_and_label
scenarios.description: A contentMatch:'indexed' predicate must include instances where 'indexed' appears in tag segments (articles 1, 3 and project-1) and in the string label field of metric-1 ('Indexed Record Count'). This tests that both tag segments and string field segments are projected.

scenarios.name: content_match_combined_type_and_content
scenarios.description: Combined typeName and contentMatch predicates: must return only article instances (structured filter, exact) that also match the content floor for 'draft' (the select field value 'draft' is searchable). The floor is articles 2 and 5 (both have status field value 'draft').
